# Third-Party Code

This directory contains vendored third-party source code that is built directly by this project.

## stb_image

- File: `third_party/stb/stb_image.h`
- Upstream: http://nothings.org/stb_image.h
- Version in header: `v2.08`
- Integration unit: `src/stb_image_impl.c`
- Include path configured in: `makefile`
